name: Berkosan Yalitim Ve Tecrit Maddeleri Uretim Ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Berkosan Yalitim Ve Tecrit Maddeleri √É¬úretim Ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells heat and sound insulation and industrial packaging materials in Turkey and internationally. It offers polyethylene, polypropylene, and cross-linked foams. The company also provides a range of services, such as interstory screed application, wall and roof insulation, soundproofing and thermal insulation, refrigerated cooler vehicle insulation, air conditioning inside and outside tools, sound and vibration isolation, and heat and noise prevention in mechanical installations. It sells its products under the Foamex, Polyberk, Proberk, Reflekt, Airpack, and Airfoam brand names. The company provides its services to the companies in the construction/industrial, packaging, fittings, automotive, footwear/bags, sea products, children playgroup, and sports/entertainment sectors. Berkosan Yalitim Ve Tecrit Maddeleri √É¬úretim Ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1993 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
